_status: NEEDS TRANSLATION — English fallback values; replace with real Arabic. Do not machine-translate.

hero.headline: A small gift goes a long way in a classroom that's listening.
hero.subheadline: Bridges runs on partnerships — with the Ministry of Education, with municipalities, and with individuals and foundations who believe that language is opportunity. Your support translates directly into classroom hours.

items.title: Sponsor a Classroom
items.body: Underwrite a full year of native English instruction for a single classroom of students.

items.title: Fund a Teacher
items.body: Bring one additional native English-speaking educator to the Negev for a semester.

items.title: Support a Student
items.body: Cover one student's enrollment in an after-school or camp program.

items.title: General Support
items.body: Every contribution, of any size, sustains the program and reaches a student.

cta.title: Speak with our partnerships team.
cta.body: We'll walk you through current needs, sponsorship structures, and how your gift can be directed.

meta.title: Contribute — Bridges Institute
meta.description: Support a decade of English-language education in the Negev. Donate, sponsor a classroom, or get involved with Bridges Institute.
